first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both give the same score and highlight the same core strengths (distributed systems, event-driven architecture) and weaknesses (lack of executive leadership, lack of experience in regulated fintech, lack of team scaling). The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of ordinary run-to-run variation and do not reflect a meaningful change in assessment based on the altered dates.
